examples: A raging forest fire burned down timberland, crops, and homes.
Charles and his friends each claimed about seven acres of timberland and began slashing away.
Timberland, a New Hampshire outdoor-gear company, is introducing detailed “Green Index” labels on its shoes.
Joe's acreage is easily developable, with the rest too remote or simply more valuable as timberland.
Harvard loaded up on illiquid stakes in private equity partnerships, emerging-market stocks, timberland and other commodities.
